name: Codex API-key mode
summary: Route Codex API-key OpenAI HTTPS traffic through DAM.

commands.label: Start DAM for Codex API-key mode

notes: Codex must keep its normal OpenAI API-key configuration; DAM does not write a custom Codex provider or base URL.
Tray/web Connect installs Network Extension capture first; proxy env fallback is retained for source builds and unsupported environments.
Codex ChatGPT-login mode uses the codex-chatgpt profile so chatgpt.com WebSocket traffic is routed through the WebSocket protocol adapter.
{{codex_api_key_env}} stays owned by Codex or the user's shell; DAM forwards caller auth headers.
